name: Spinach- Turkey Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup frozen spinach, thawed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the spinach is thawed and the mushrooms are drained.
2. Mix all ingredients together.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shells.
4. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 30 to 40 minutes.
